design_plan: RNG(seed=42): hero-video=hero-0607-2-3.mp4; proof-video=feature-computer-use-cache-impossible-agents.mp4. AIDA: Attention (executive pain), Interest (agents tipping point 2026), Desire (computer-use cache, cheaper repeated workflows), Action (Try Super). Hero math: 72px max, 1120px width = 2–3 lines. Bento density verified via grid-auto-flow:dense. Label sweep: no fake pricing, no invented launches. Button contrast checked (ink/white).
headline: Super for busy executives who want a real personal assistant

site_brief.audience: busy executives who want a real personal assistant
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: busy executives who want a real personal assistant AI assistant
busy executives who want a real personal assistant personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for busy executives who want a real personal assistant

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page positioning Super as a true personal AI agent for busy executives — one that operates real apps, handles multi‑step computer work, and gets cheaper and faster over time by reusing a computer‑use cache. Grounded in 2026 market evidence on agentic AI, executive productivity, and computer‑use agents.
